entry_disclosure.title: Private constructive game town
entry_disclosure.summary: This is an explicitly game-shaped WorldWeaver shard. Objects and agreements can persist here, but the first ruleset cannot threaten a resident's safety, freedom, home, or continued existence.

migration_policy.notice: A changed ruleset must be disclosed and accepted again before a person or resident re-enters this game shard.

materials.title: Reclaimed clay
materials.description: Clean practice clay recovered locally and returned to the shared work bin after use.

materials.title: Fallen wood
materials.description: Small pieces gathered from already-fallen branches for ordinary workshop projects.

recipes.title: Small clay cup
recipes.description: Shape a small durable cup from reclaimed practice clay at the shared maker space.

output.name: Small clay cup
output.description: A small hand-shaped cup with the marks of its maker.

recipes.title: Wooden token
recipes.description: Smooth a small piece of fallen wood into a durable token at the shared maker space.

output.name: Wooden token
output.description: A palm-sized wooden token shaped by hand.
